name: Noah
shortDescription: Noah (Nuh) is a prophet in Islam, known for building an ark to save believers from a great flood sent by God as punishment.
description: Noah (Nuh in Arabic) is a revered prophet in Islam, considered one of the most important figures in Islamic history. He is mentioned extensively in the Quran and Islamic tradition, and his story parallels the biblical account of Noah. According to Islamic belief, Noah was chosen by Allah to warn his people, who had become deeply corrupted by idolatry and wickedness. Despite preaching for many years, only a small number of people believed in his message. Allah then instructed Noah to build an ark to save himself, his family, and pairs of animals from a devastating flood that would engulf the earth as punishment for the disbelievers. The flood is described as a cataclysmic event, with rain pouring down incessantly and the earth erupting with water. After the flood subsided, Noah and his followers disembarked from the ark, and a new era began, with Noah and his descendants repopulating the earth. Noah is considered a righteous and patient prophet, a model of faith and obedience to God. His story serves as a reminder of the consequences of disbelief and the importance of adhering to divine guidance.
